---
title: "Gallery examples"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Gallery examples}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 4.5,
  dpi = 96,
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

Example figures for the main `ggtimeline` surfaces. Static PNG copies used in
the package README live under `man/figures/demo-*.png`.

```{r setup}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtimeline)
```

## Interval events with milestones

```{r intervals, fig.alt = "Interval timeline with a milestone marker"}
trials <- data.frame(
  start = as.Date(c("2021-01-01", "2022-06-01", "2023-01-01")),
  end   = as.Date(c("2021-09-01", "2023-02-01", "2023-11-01")),
  topic = c("Phase I", "Phase II", "Phase III"),
  arm   = c("A", "A", "B")
)

ggtimeline(
  trials,
  aes(x = start, xend = end, label = topic, fill = arm),
  year_breaks = "1 year",
  span_height = 0.12
) +
  scale_timeline_fill() +
  add_milestone(as.Date("2022-06-01"), label = "IND filing") +
  labs(title = "Clinical intervals with a milestone")
```

## Swimlanes

```{r swimlanes, fig.height = 7, fig.alt = "Swimlane timeline by category"}
data("phenotype_methods_timeline")

ggtimeline_swimlane(
  phenotype_methods_timeline,
  aes(x = date, label = topic, group = category, fill = category),
  lane_spacing = 3,
  year_breaks = "1 year",
  label_size = 2.6
) +
  scale_timeline_fill() +
  labs(title = "One ribbon lane per category")
```

## Gantt chart

```{r gantt, fig.height = 3.8, fig.alt = "Gantt-style project timeline"}
ggtimeline_gantt(
  trials,
  aes(x = start, xend = end, label = topic, fill = arm)
) +
  scale_timeline_fill() +
  labs(title = "Gantt layout")
```

## Faceted timeline

```{r facet, fig.height = 8, fig.alt = "Faceted timeline by category"}
ggtimeline(
  phenotype_methods_timeline,
  aes(x = date, label = topic, fill = category),
  year_breaks = "1 year",
  label_size = 2.4,
  base_height = 0.85,
  height_step = 0.65
) +
  facet_timeline(~category) +
  scale_timeline_fill() +
  labs(title = "Faceted ribbon panels")
```
